ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2020 Continued To Mar-17-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel JACK H. POGOSIAN, ESQ is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to MAR-17-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Failure to appear for future matters may be subject to dismissal per Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: RAYMOND K. WONG; Proceedings not reported. (610)
